name: Spinach Dip (Low/no Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the sour cream, spinach, garlic powder, onion powder, oregano, salt, and pepper until well combined.
2. Gradually stir in the flour, mixing until smooth.
3. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted and incorporated.
4. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish.
5. Slice the top third off of one bread loaf and hollow out the inside.
6. Fill the bread loaf with the dip and surround it with fresh vegetables for dipping.
